mnemonics.title: Programmer's Interface Mnemonic
mnemonics.content: P - Primary function is to manage the graphics pipeline, I - Includes graphics library, device driver, and graphics API, N - Necessary for creating graphical applications, T - Tasks include vertex processing, geometry transformation, and pixel rendering, E - Essential for computer graphics, R - Renders pixels, F - Functions include providing a set of APIs for performing common graphics tasks, A - Accesses graphics hardware, C - Creates graphical applications, E - Essential for programmers
